title: Senior Doctor - Apollo Hospitals - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Apollo Hospitals - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!
